channel.title: Webui on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Webui on Arrans github.io

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features OpenAI, Assistants API, Azure, Groq, GPT-4 Vision, Mistral, Bing, Anthropic, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, AI model switching, message search, langchain, DALL-E-3, ChatGPT Plugins, OpenAI Functions, Secure Multi-User System, Presets, completely open-source for self-hosting. More features in development

item.title: kabachuha/sd-webui-text2video
item.description: Auto1111 extension implementing text2video diffusion models (like ModelScope or VideoCrafter) using only Auto1111 webui dependencies

item.title: rstemmer/musicdb
item.description: 🎧 A music manager with focus on remote access to your music by having a WebUI and providing an audio stream.
